---
name: ⚠️ Security vulnerability
about: DO NOT use this template — see SECURITY.md instead
title: "DO NOT REPORT SECURITY ISSUES HERE"
labels: ''

---

**STOP.** Public issues are visible to everyone, including anyone who might
exploit an unpatched vulnerability.

Please follow the private disclosure process in
[SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) instead: use GitHub's private vulnerability
reporting (Security tab → Report a vulnerability) or email
goktugturhan74@gmail.com.
